query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A person with short hair sits with their head slightly bowed in an interior space, positioned to the right of two large, dark rectangular forms that suggest furniture or windows; the entire scene is built from horizontal rows of white text characters on a black ground, with variations in line density and negative space defining the figural shapes and surrounding objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with short hair sits with their head slightly bowed in an interior space beside two large dark rectangular forms, the entire scene fractured by dense horizontal scanlines of white text and numbers that overwrite every surface; cast in a muted, desaturated brown-black monotone, the image lacks clear fine detail as facial features and textures dissolve into rows of characters, producing a heavily degraded and textureless visual effect.
